message:
chore(beads): add bd-ts3l3 (PORT: getbsize BSD libutil block-size header)

Adds a new open task bead tracking the BSD libutil getbsize() port —
the in-progress source file at crates/frankenlibc-core/src/stdlib/getbsize.rs
in the working tree (not committed here; owned by the implementing
agent) is the start of that work.

No code or other-bead state changes; the ledger picks up just this
single new task entry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
